vo/compmode/cm_spy_gamewon_01.mp3.transcript: Another day, another back with a gaping stab wound!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_gamewon_02.mp3.transcript: For someone else, that might have been a challenge!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_gamewon_05.mp3.transcript: So many backs, so little time!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_gamewon_06.mp3.transcript: We won! Let's do it again!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_gamewon_07.mp3.transcript: We have won the battle, now let's win the war!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_matchwon_11.mp3.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha! How do you like the Spy now?

vo/compmode/cm_spy_matchwon_12.mp3.transcript: Ha ha ha ha ha ha! Yes!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_01.mp3.transcript: Shall I carry us to victory? I don't mind.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_09.mp3.transcript: Who else is ready to win?

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_10.mp3.transcript: I feel like winning. Who is with me?

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_12.mp3.transcript: I think we'll win this game.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_6s_01.mp.transcript: Five sacks of flour to carry on my back to victory? (sigh) If I must.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_6s_02.mp.transcript: Six healthy backs just waiting to be stabbed! (sniff) Ah, there's that new back smell.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_6s_03.mp.transcript: Six unstabbed backs: smooth, healthy, untouched by knife wounds? I do love a blank canvas!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_6s_04.mp.transcript: Ah, so 6s finally came crawling to the Spy. About time.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_6s_05.mp.transcript: Finally, 6s comes to its senses and welcomes a Spy to its ranks.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_6s_06.mp.transcript: Finally, 6s is worth playing, because you can play as me.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_comp_01..transcript: Finally, a comp class that can bring some class with it!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_comp_02..transcript: Finally, you've come to your senses and welcomed a Spy to your ranks!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_comp_03..transcript: Finally, a Comp Mode is worth playing because you can play as me.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_rare_01..transcript: I like my enemies like I like my wines: I let them breathe, for a moment.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_rare_02..transcript: I like my teams like I like my romances: in groups of six.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamefirst_rare_03..transcript: My knife is sharp, my watch is wound, my ski mask is freshly-laundered: time to win.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_01.mp.transcript: We are not out of this yet!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_02.mp.transcript: I've gotten out of worse scrapes than this!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_03.mp.transcript: Listen up, gentlemen, time to get serious!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_04.mp.transcript: Our best kills are still ahead of us!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_05.mp.transcript: That last game was just a warm-up!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_06.mp.transcript: Enough practice, time to start playing!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_07.mp.transcript: They beat us once, they will not beat us again!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_08.mp.transcript: We are a game down, time to get serious!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_09.mp.transcript: We are not out of this match yet!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamelostlast_10.mp.transcript: They will not beat us again!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregametie_01.mp3.transcript: I have never been more ready!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregametie_02.mp3.transcript: We are tied? We must correct this immediately!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregametie_03.mp3.transcript: We are tied, gentlemen! Let's get this done!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregametie_04.mp3.transcript: If there's one thing I hate, it's a tied game!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregametie_05.mp3.transcript: We are tied? We might as well be losing!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregametie_rare_01.mp.transcript: I have a tie. I'm wearing it, it's silk, and it costs $9000. I do not need another one!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamewonlast_01.mp3.transcript: Gentlemen, this game is as good as ours!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamewonlast_02.mp3.transcript: I have a good feeling about this game!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamewonlast_05.mp3.transcript: Keep up the pressure, we haven't won yet.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamewonlast_06.mp3.transcript: We should go easy on them. They are playing with a handicap. They do not have me on their team!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamewonlast_07.mp3.transcript: I think I developed a taste for winning. Let's do it again!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamewonlast_08.mp3.transcript: Already? I haven't wiped the blood off my knife from the last round.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamewonlast_10.mp3.transcript: Spy, you are as unkillable as you are handsome!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_pregamewonlast_11.mp3.transcript: We're a game up! Let's do that...again.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_rankup_05.mp3.transcript: "I am uncorking a bottle of 1942 Château Backstab!" (uncorking sound)

vo/compmode/cm_spy_rankup_07.mp3.transcript: It seems we've been given a promotion!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_rankup_09.mp3.transcript: If there's one thing I like more than winning, it's ranking up!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_rankup_highest_01.mp3.transcript: And when the Spy saw the breadth of his achievement, he wept, for there were no more backs to stab.

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_03.mp.transcript: It's about time they recognized our brilliance!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_04.mp.transcript: Ho ho hoh! They have been shown who is the boss!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_05.mp.transcript: We have gained the acceptance of our inferiors!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_07.mp.transcript: I am not easily impressed, and yet you have impressed me!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_08.mp.transcript: I am the deadliest man I know, but you are a close second!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_11.mp.transcript: Our work is finally being recognized!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_12.mp.transcript: It looks like we've been busy!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_15.mp.transcript: Yes! My friend, we have done it!

vo/compmode/cm_spy_summary_callout_16.mp.transcript: We did it! I mean, of course we did it.

vo/spy_autoonfire01.mp3.transcript: I appear to have burst into flames.

vo/spy_autoonfire03.mp3.transcript: I do believe I'm on fire.

vo/spy_cartgoingbackoffense01.mp3.transcript: The cart is supposed to move forward!

vo/spy_cartgoingbackoffense02.mp3.transcript: Damn it! We are losing ground!

vo/spy_cartgoingforwarddefense04.mp3.transcript: We need to stop that cart!

vo/spy_cartstopitdefense01.mp3.transcript: We've got to stop that bomb!

vo/spy_cartstoppedoffense03.mp3.transcript: Why is the cart not moving?!

vo/spy_cheers07.mp3.transcript: The outcome was never really in doubt.

vo/spy_cloakedspy01.mp3.transcript: It seems I am not the only Spy.

vo/spy_cloakedspyidentify07.mp3.transcript: That Spy is not one of us!

vo/spy_dominationdemoman02.mp3.transcript: How's that bottle of Scrumpy now?

vo/spy_dominationdemoman04.mp3.transcript: Don't feel bad; you did a fine job tossing your little balls around!

vo/spy_dominationdemoman05.mp3.transcript: The Black Scottish Cyclops — now extinct!

vo/spy_dominationdemoman06.mp3.transcript: I've merely finished what your liver started!

vo/spy_dominationdemoman07.mp3.transcript: Here's what I have that you don't: a functioning liver, depth perception, and a pulse!

vo/spy_dominationengineer01.mp3.transcript: Yippee ki-yay, my dead, illiterate friend!

vo/spy_dominationengineer04.mp3.transcript: "Did I throw a wrench into your plans?" (laughs maniacally)

vo/spy_dominationengineer05.mp3.transcript: Not much of a quick-draw, are you, pardner?

vo/spy_dominationheavy01.mp3.transcript: Oh, fat man, please! This is getting awkward!

vo/spy_dominationheavy03.mp3.transcript: That is a diet I call 'death.'

vo/spy_dominationheavy04.mp3.transcript: Dominated, you fatuous, fat-headed fat man!

vo/spy_dominationheavy05.mp3.transcript: You died as you lived: morbidly obese!

vo/spy_dominationheavy06.mp3.transcript: Your precious sandvich won't save you now, fatty!

vo/spy_dominationheavy07.mp3.transcript: Aww, too bad this wasn't a pie-eating contest!

vo/spy_dominationheavy08.mp3.transcript: "What's the matter? Fat got your tongue?" (laughs)

vo/spy_dominationmedic01.mp3.transcript: [Laughing] "Laughter really is the best medicine!" (laughs again)

vo/spy_dominationmedic03.mp3.transcript: Aww, you almost healed me to death that time!

vo/spy_dominationmedic04.mp3.transcript: I'm looking at your x-ray, and I'm afraid you suck!

vo/spy_dominationmedic05.mp3.transcript: [Laughing] "You are such a bad doctor!" (laughs again)

vo/spy_dominationmedic06.mp3.transcript: Does it hurt when I do that? It does, doesn't it?!

vo/spy_dominationpyro02.mp3.transcript: Good Lord! You fight like a woman!

vo/spy_dominationpyro03.mp3.transcript: The world will thank me for this, you monster!

vo/spy_dominationpyro04.mp3.transcript: Burn in hell, you mumbling abomination!

vo/spy_dominationscout01.mp3.transcript: Well, off to visit your mother!

vo/spy_dominationscout02.mp3.transcript: You died as you lived: running away!

vo/spy_dominationscout03.mp3.transcript: Ooh, you were quick as a little bunny, weren't you?

vo/spy_dominationscout04.mp3.transcript: Here lies Scout--he ran fast and died a virgin.

vo/spy_dominationscout05.mp3.transcript: Weren't you supposed to be good at dodging?

vo/spy_dominationscout06.mp3.transcript: May I borrow your earpiece?" [mimicking Scout] "'This is Scout! Rainbows make me cry! Over!'

vo/spy_dominationscout07.mp3.transcript: Nothing personal, I just had to shut you up.

vo/spy_dominationscout08.mp3.transcript: So, your deadly skill is jogging? Mine is murdering people.

vo/spy_dominationsniper02.mp3.transcript: You disgust me, filthy jar man!

vo/spy_dominationsniper06.mp3.transcript: Perhaps they can bury you in that van you call 'home.'

vo/spy_dominationsoldier01.mp3.transcript: Maybe your colleagues will send a man next time.

vo/spy_dominationsoldier02.mp3.transcript: I dominate you, you sluggish simpleton.

vo/spy_dominationsoldier03.mp3.transcript: At least you died for honor -- and my amusement!

vo/spy_dominationsoldier04.mp3.transcript: "Oh, Soldier, who will they ever find to replace you? Anyone!" (laughs)

vo/spy_dominationsoldier05.mp3.transcript: They can bury you in the 'Tomb of the Unskilled Soldier!

vo/spy_dominationspy01.mp3.transcript: Go to hell, and take your cheap suit with you!

vo/spy_dominationspy02.mp3.transcript: We all knew you were a Spy!

vo/spy_dominationspy03.mp3.transcript: You are an amateur and a fool!

vo/spy_dominationspy04.mp3.transcript: I'll see you in hell... you handsome rogue!

vo/spy_dominationspy05.mp3.transcript: You are an embarrassment to Spies everywhere!

vo/spy_helpmecapture03.mp3.transcript: Would someone care to help me capture this?

vo/spy_helpmedefend03.mp3.transcript: I could use a hand defending here!

vo/spy_item_unicorn_capped01.mp3.transcript: I claim this point for unicorns!

vo/spy_item_unicorn_capped02.mp3.transcript: I claim this point for France, and the unicorns!

vo/spy_item_unicorn_capped03.mp3.transcript: This cap point is now under the iron hoof of Unicorn Fairyland!

vo/spy_item_unicorn_case_cap01.mp3.transcript: Never send a Scout to do a unicorn's job.

vo/spy_item_unicorn_domination01.mp3.transcript: There's no room for two pretty unicorns!

vo/spy_item_unicorn_round_start01.mp3.transcript: I'm not just any unicorn! I am the prettiest unicorn that ever was!

vo/spy_item_unicorn_round_start02.mp3.transcript: You don't need to tell me I am the prettiest unicorn! I know I am the prettiest unicorn!

vo/spy_item_unicorn_round_start03.mp3.transcript: If there are any unicorns prettier than me, I will find them. I will follow them. And no one will ever see those unicorns again.

vo/spy_item_unicorn_round_start04.mp3.transcript: I can feel the unicorn friendship magic coursing through my veins!

vo/spy_item_unicorn_round_start05.mp3.transcript: Today, I am a pony god!

vo/spy_jaratehit04.mp3.transcript: I have been shown who is the boss!

vo/spy_mvm_loot_godlike03.mp3.transcript: It's the only one of its kind! And it's mine!

vo/spy_mvm_loot_rare01.mp3.transcript: I'll give it a good home!

vo/spy_mvm_mannhattan_gate_atk01.mp3.transcript: The robots are at the gate!

vo/spy_mvm_mannhattan_gate_atk02.mp3.transcript: The robots are taking the gate!

vo/spy_mvm_mannhattan_gate_take01.mp3.transcript: The robots have taken the gate!

vo/spy_paulingkilltaunt01.mp3.transcript: I'll tell Miss Pauling you're... Occupied.

vo/spy_paulingkilltaunt02.mp3.transcript: Mhm. Well, maybe I'll ask Miss Pauling out?

vo/spy_rpsregretpaper01.mp3.transcript: Paper! I should have chosen Paper!

vo/spy_rpsregretrock01.mp3.transcript: Rock! I should have chosen Rock!

vo/spy_rpsregretscissor01.mp3.transcript: Scissors! I should have chosen Scissors!

vo/spy_sf12_falling02.mp3.transcript: (Dramatic scream) Come on, I don't have all day.

vo/spy_sf13_magic_reac06.mp3.transcript: You imbecile! You've doomed us all!

vo/spy_sf13_midnight06.mp3.transcript: Now, gentlemen! Grab all that you can!

vo/spy_sf13_round_start01.mp3.transcript: This won't be the first corpse I've disposed of in the dead of night.

vo/spy_sf13_round_start02.mp3.transcript: As long as nothing supernatural happens, this should be easy.

vo/spy_sf13_round_start03.mp3.transcript: Why is it always this time of year we get assignments like this?

vo/spy_sf13_round_start04.mp3.transcript: Gentlemen! Let's push a dead man to hell!

vo/spy_sf13_round_start05.mp3.transcript: This dead man belongs in hell! Let's take him home!

vo/spy_sf13_round_start06.mp3.transcript: Let's give this wretch his final reward!

vo/spy_specialcompleted03.mp3.transcript: Oh dear, I've made quite a mess.

vo/spy_specialcompleted05.mp3.transcript: I murdered your toys as well.

vo/spy_specialcompleted07.mp3.transcript: I never really was on your side.

vo/spy_specialcompleted08.mp3.transcript: Thank you for being such a dear friend.

vo/spy_specialcompleted11.mp3.transcript: You got blood on my suit.

vo/spy_stabtaunt02.mp3.transcript: Time to make that ugly face a little prettier!

vo/spy_stabtaunt03.mp3.transcript: Ah, stab wounds. My favorite type of wound!

vo/spy_stabtaunt04.mp3.transcript: Shock, blood loss, infection; Oh ho ho ho, I love stabbing!

vo/spy_stabtaunt05.mp3.transcript: Some are born great, others have greatness thrust into their sternums!

vo/spy_stabtaunt06.mp3.transcript: Let's make it straight to the point!

vo/spy_stabtaunt07.mp3.transcript: I'm not going to stab you, I'm not going to stab you! HA! I stabbed you!

vo/spy_stabtaunt08.mp3.transcript: I'm going to filet you like a salmon.

vo/spy_stabtaunt09.mp3.transcript: I'm going to puncture you like a juice box.

vo/spy_stabtaunt10.mp3.transcript: I'm going to carve you like a partridge.

vo/spy_stabtaunt11.mp3.transcript: I'm going to carve you like a pumpkin.

vo/spy_stabtaunt12.mp3.transcript: I'm going to butcher you like a pig.

vo/spy_stabtaunt13.mp3.transcript: I am going to hack you up like cordwood.

vo/spy_stabtaunt14.mp3.transcript: I'm going to filet you like a salmon.

vo/spy_stabtaunt15.mp3.transcript: I am going to hack you up like cordwood.

vo/spy_stabtaunt16.mp3.transcript: I'm going to puncture you like an old tire.

vo/spy_standonthepoint02.mp3.transcript: Come stand on the point, you idiot!

vo/spy_standonthepoint03.mp3.transcript: Idiot! Come stand on the point.

vo/spy_standonthepoint04.mp3.transcript: Come stand on the point, you imbecile!

vo/spy_tietaunt01.mp3.transcript: Let's see. Yes, good! I still look magnificent.

vo/spy_tietaunt03.mp3.transcript: Ho ho ho. It should be a crime to look this good.

vo/spy_tietaunt04.mp3.transcript: It should be a crime to look this good.

vo/spy_tietaunt05.mp3.transcript: Heh heh heh heh. Like a wolf among the lambs.

vo/spy_tietaunt06.mp3.transcript: Like a wolf among the lambs.

vo/spy_tietaunt07.mp3.transcript: (admiringly) "You handsome devil. Don't you ever die!"

vo/spy_tietaunt08.mp3.transcript: It's a privilege to be killed by a man who looks this good.

vo/spy_tietaunt09.mp3.transcript: As if I would get blood on a $3,000 suit. Come on.

vo/taunts/spy/spy_aerobic_pos_01.mp3.transcript: Oh yeah! Haha! Mmm hmm heh heh hah hah!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_aerobic_pos_05.mp3.transcript: Mmm. (heavily breathing) Ha ha ha ha hah hah!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_aerobic_pos_09.mp3.transcript: (exhales heavily) "Hmmph! Heh ha ha ha ha ha!"

vo/taunts/spy/spy_aerobic_pos_20.mp3.transcript: (heavily breathing) "The moves! I have all of them!"

vo/taunts/spy/spy_aerobic_pos_41.mp3.transcript: Ah! Ze moves, they just sneak up on you! Ah ha ha!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_aerobic_pos_43.mp3.transcript: (heavily breathing) "Feel ze burn! Be ze burn! Ah hah, ha ha!"

vo/taunts/spy/spy_aerobic_pos_44.mp3.transcript: (exhales heavily) "You want it, Spy! You want it!" (heavily breathing)

vo/taunts/spy/spy_aerobic_pos_45.mp3.transcript: (exhales heavily) "I believe it! So I can achieve it!" (heavily breathing)

vo/taunts/spy/spy_kill_taunt_13.mp3.transcript: Here. Go buy a nicer hat.

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_cong_fun_02.mp3.transcript: Ahhh! Ho ho ho ho ho hah!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_cong_fun_15.mp3.transcript: (singing) "Bum ba bum bum ba bum bum bum!"

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_cong_fun_17.mp3.transcript: Bum bum boom bum, bum bum boom bum, bum bum boom!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_cong_int_05.mp3.transcript: Dancing! It is the forbidden dance!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_cong_int_11.mp3.transcript: Let us dance, gentlemen! Dance like no one's shooting at us!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_dosi_end_06.mp3.transcript: If you speak of this, I will kill you!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_dosi_end_14.mp3.transcript: I will stab this memory out of my skull!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_dosi_end_32.mp3.transcript: And we're done! Time to shower.

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_dosi_end_37.mp3.transcript: And we're done! Off to hang myself!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_taunt_dosi_int_16.mp3.transcript: I will never live this down!

vo/taunts/spy/spy_tnt_dosido_init04.mp3.transcript: Who among you is man enough to dance with me?

vo/taunts/spy/spy_trade_09.mp3.transcript: You're green with envy, I can tell.

vo/taunts/spy/spy_trade_22.mp3.transcript: I spare no expense on luxuries.

vo/taunts/spy_highfive10.mp3.transcript: Leave me hanging and you will regret it.

vo/taunts/spy_highfive13.mp3.transcript: Come on, I don't have all day.

vo/taunts/spy_highfive_success04.mp3.transcript: Well, the moment has passed, back to work!

vo/taunts/spy_highfive_success05.mp3.transcript: Well, the moment has passed; back to work!

vo/taunts/spy_taunts01.mp3.transcript: Promise not to bleed on my suit, and I'll kill you quickly.

vo/taunts/spy_taunts02.mp3.transcript: I'm going to gut you like a Cornish game hen.

vo/taunts/spy_taunts07.mp3.transcript: Why don't we just give up, pardner?

vo/taunts/spy_taunts08.mp3.transcript: Everyone back to the base, pardner.

vo/taunts/spy_taunts09.mp3.transcript: Just lay your weapons down and walk away.

vo/taunts/spy_taunts11.mp3.transcript: May I make a suggestion? Run.

vo/taunts/spy_taunts12.mp3.transcript: You're all of you quite out of your depth!

vo/taunts/spy_taunts14.mp3.transcript: They should call you whiners 'Dr. NOOOOOO!'

vo/taunts/spy_taunts16.mp3.transcript: This will be the last time you see me.

vo/toughbreak/spy_quest_complete_easy_03.transcript: For someone else, that might have been a challenge!

vo/toughbreak/spy_quest_complete_easy_07.transcript: Another day, another back with a gaping stab wound!

vo/toughbreak/spy_quest_complete_hard_01.transcript: Yes! My friend, we have done it!

vo/toughbreak/spy_quest_complete_hard_02.transcript: We did it! I mean, of course we did it.
